headline: Jack Ma-Backed Ant Group Set for High-Stakes Overhaul of Billion-User App
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Ant Group Co. is testing an overhaul to its Alipay super app that would introduce an AI agent interface, a major escalation in its battle for users with archrival WeChat.Most Read from BloombergWhy Musk Raced to Take SpaceX Public in the World’s Biggest IPOTrump Eyes Sunday Iran Deal But Tehran Says Still Reviewing TextUS Wants to Avoid Congressional Vote on Trade Deal, Carney SaysAnthropic Shuts Down Mythos Access After Sweeping US OrderAir India Plans to Downsize With Owner Tata

headline: Wells Fargo Sees Greater Upside in Qualcomm (QCOM) Ahead of Investor Day
summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated (NASDAQ:QCOM) is included among the 10 Best S&P 500 Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. Wells Fargo raised its price recommendation on QUALCOMM Incorporated (NASDAQ:QCOM) to $230 from $160 on June 12. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating on the shares ahead of the company’s Investor Day. The firm said its bull-case scenario […]
